description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized nivolumab in combination with platinum-based chemotherapy for the neoadjuvant treatment of adult patients with resectable non-small cell lung cancer at high risk of recurrence whose tumors haev PD-L1 expression >= 1%. This indication is based on CA209816, a randomized, open-label, phase 3 study where the selection of platinum-based chemotherapy was investigator's choice of paclitaxel and carboplatin, pemetrexed and cisplatin, or gemcitabine and cisplatin.
